Jiwon Choi Robust State Estimation · Learned Inertial Odometry
👋 Hi! I'm Jiwon — I study Robust State Estimation and Learned Inertial Odometry at SPARO Lab.
  • Integrated M.S.–Ph.D. Student
  • Incheon, South Korea
  • SPARO Lab, Inha University
  • jivvon2@gmail.com

Profile

I'm an integrated M.S.–Ph.D. student in the Department of Electrical and Computer Engineering at Inha University, advised by Younggun Cho in SPARO Lab. I also received my B.S. in Electrical Engineering from Inha University. During my M.S., I worked on robust state estimation through learned inertial odometry, and I'm now studying motion generation for robust and adaptive robot behavior. For my personal thoughts and research experiences, please check out my :)

Latest News

  • 2026.06 Placed 2nd in the SLAM category of the Hilti-Trimble SLAM Challenge at ICRA 2026.
  • 2026.06 KISS-IMU received the Outstanding WiRA Student Paper Award at ICRA 2026. 1st Author
  • 2026.05 KISS-IMU selected as a finalist for the Best Paper Award on Robot Perception at ICRA 2026. 1st Author
  • 2026.03 Selected for the ICRA 2026 RAS Travel Support.

Publications

2026

  1. KISS-IMU: Self-supervised Inertial Odometry with Motion-balanced Learning and Uncertainty-aware Inference
    Jiwon Choi, Hogyun Kim, Geonmo Yang, Juhui Lee, Younggun Cho
    ICRA, 2026 , 2026/06 · Best Paper on Robot Perception Finalist
    arXiv Project Code

  1. PoLaRIS Dataset: A Maritime Object Detection and Tracking Dataset in Pohang Canal
    Jiwon Choi*, Dongjin Cho*, Giheyon Lee, Hogyun Kim, Geonmo Yang, Joowan Kim, Younggun Cho
    ICRA, 2025 , 2025/05
    Paper arXiv Project Code
  2. SKiD-SLAM: Robust, Lightweight, and Distributed Multi-Robot LiDAR SLAM in Resource-Constrained Field Environments
    Hogyun Kim, Jiwon Choi, Juwon Kim, Geonmo Yang, Dongjin Cho, Hyungtae Lim, Younggun Cho
    ICRA workshop on Field Robotics (spotlight talk), 2025 , 2025/05
    arXiv Project Code

    Jiwon Choi, Hogyun Kim, Geonmo Yang, Younggun Cho
    Korea Institute of ITS Conference , 2025/04 · Excellent Paper Award

2024

  1. Narrowing your FOV with SOLiD: Spatially Organized and Lightweight Global Descriptor for FOV-constrained LiDAR Place Recognition

    RA-L , 2024/08
    Paper arXiv Project Code
  2. 가벼운 전역 설명자로 이루어진 위치 인식 기술을 이용한 강인한 슬램 기술
